title: Darken theme and update PIN code to 18/215

requirements.text: Update the frontend color theme to a darker visual style by adjusting the CSS custom property palette in frontend/src/index.css. Darken background, surface, card, and sidebar tokens while preserving the existing warm earthy palette direction. Ensure both light and dark theme variants are consistently updated so the app feels noticeably darker overall.

quotes: change the theme to a little dark colour

acceptanceCriteria: The app background and surface areas are visibly darker than before
The warm earthy color palette identity is preserved
Both light and dark theme CSS tokens are updated consistently
Text remains readable with sufficient contrast against the darkened backgrounds
No white or very light backgrounds appear on main content areas

requirements.text: Change the owner PIN code from its current value to '18215' (digits 18/215). Update the backend Motoko actor in backend/main.mo so that PIN validation accepts '18215' as the correct owner PIN.
acceptanceCriteria: Entering '18215' on the OwnerPinPrompt successfully authenticates the owner
The previous PIN no longer grants access
The PIN validation logic in the backend actor is updated to the new value

constraints: Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Do not alter the data schema or existing backend query/mutation function signatures
Preserve the warm earthy palette identity — only darken the tones, do not replace the palette entirely
nonGoals: Changing any layout, component structure, or feature functionality
Switching to a completely different color palette or design language
